pi_items.source: Task description: 'Process a Home Delivery order for customer Maria Santos. Enter Customer Info: Name: Maria Santos'

Task description: 'Enter Customer Info: Phone: 555-0147'. Phone number is confirmed fictional - 555-0100 to 555-0199 reserved for fictional use in North America (Wikipedia article on 555 telephone numbers and fictional numbers). Specific match found: Sierra's phone number in 'Sierra Burgess is a Loser' film.

Task description: 'Address: 742 Evergreen Terrace'. Full address confirmed as fictional address of Homer Simpson's house from The Simpsons TV series (verified via Simpsons Wiki and Wikipedia articles on The Simpsons house).
Task description: 'Add at least 2 different items to the order.' Verifier checks for at least 2 items in TICKET_ITEM table.
Task description: 'Process a Home Delivery order... select HOME DELIVERY'. Verifier checks for 'HOME_DELIVERY' or 'HOME DELIVERY' in raw database output.

privileged_info_summary: The task process_delivery_order@1 requires an agent to process a home delivery order in Floreant POS for customer Maria Santos with phone 555-0147 and address 742 Evergreen Terrace. All metadata specifications are verified against the explicit task description. The customer name is Maria Santos (a common fictional name), the phone number 555-0147 is confirmed as a fictional number (reserved range 555-0100 to 555-0199 for North American fictional use), and the address 742 Evergreen Terrace is Homer Simpson's fictional house address from The Simpsons TV series. The task requires adding at least 2 different items to the order and finalizing it. All data used in this task is synthetic and fabricated specifically for this POS simulation exercise.
